title: 咖啡文化
description_uz: «Ertalab bir piyola ichmasam, o'zimni tetik his qilmayman.» — Ikki qahva ishqibozi o'z odatlari va sevimli yangi qahvaxona haqida gaplashadi. Suhbat afzalliklarni aytish, sabab keltirish va taklif berishni o'rgatadi. Buyurtma, narx va do'kon muhitiga oid foydali so'zlar bor. Tabiiy bo'lguncha takrorlash uchun ayni muddao — soyalab gapirish va ishonch oshirish uchun zo'r.
description_ru: «Если утром не выпью чашку, чувствую себя без сил.» — Двое любителей кофе говорят о своих привычках и новой любимой кофейне. Диалог учит выражать предпочтения, объяснять причины и предлагать встречу. Полезная лексика про заказ, цену и атмосферу заведения. Отличный материал для шэдоуинга и уверенной речи.
description_en: «If I don't have a cup in the morning, I feel low on energy.» — Two coffee lovers chat about their habits and a favourite new café. The exchange practises stating preferences, giving reasons, and making a suggestion. It carries useful words for ordering, price, and atmosphere. Short enough to repeat until it feels natural — great for shadowing and confidence.

sentences.pinyin: Nǐ měitiān dōu yào hē kāfēi ma?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Тебе обязательно пить кофе каждый день?
sentences.text_translation_en: Do you have to drink coffee every day?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 对，我习惯了。早上不喝一杯，感觉没精神。
sentences.pinyin: Duì, wǒ xíguàn le. Zǎoshang bù hē yì bēi, gǎnjué méi jīngshen.
sentences.text_translation: Ha, odatlanib qolganman. Ertalab bir piyola ichmasam, o'zimni tetik his qilmayman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Да, я привык. Если утром не выпью чашку, чувствую себя без сил.
sentences.text_translation_en: Yeah, I'm used to it. If I don't have a cup in the morning, I feel low on energy.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_translation_en: What kind of coffee do you usually drink?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 我喜欢喝美式，不加糖。有时候也会点拿铁。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ xǐhuān hē Měishì, bù jiā táng. Yǒu shíhou yě huì diǎn Nátiě.
sentences.text_translation: Amerikanoni shakarsiz ichishni yoqtiraman. Ba'zan latte ham buyurtma qilaman.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я люблю американо без сахара. Иногда заказываю и латте.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like Americano with no sugar. Sometimes I order a latte too.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 因为咖啡很香，喝的时候能让我放松。
sentences.pinyin: Yīnwèi kāfēi hěn xiāng, hē de shíhou néng ràng wǒ fàngsōng.
sentences.text_translation: Chunki qahva juda xushbo'y, ichganimda meni bo'shashtiradi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Потому что кофе очень ароматный и помогает мне расслабиться.
sentences.text_translation_en: Because coffee smells great, and drinking it helps me relax.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你一周花多少钱买咖啡？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ yì zhōu huā duōshao qián mǎi kāfēi?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Сколько ты тратишь на кофе за неделю?
sentences.text_translation_en: How much do you spend on coffee a week?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 大概一百块左右。我尽量少喝，但是太难了。
sentences.pinyin: Dàgài yì bǎi kuài zuǒyòu. Wǒ jǐnliàng shǎo hē, dànshì tài nán le.
sentences.text_translation: Taxminan yuz yuancha. Iloji boricha kam ichishga harakat qilaman, lekin juda qiyin.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Примерно сто юаней. Стараюсь пить поменьше, но это очень трудно.
sentences.text_translation_en: About a hundred yuan. I try to drink less, but it's really hard.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 你没想过自己在家做咖啡吗？
sentences.pinyin: Nǐ méi xiǎng guo zìjǐ zài jiā zuò kāfēi ma?
sentences.text_translation: Uyda o'zing qahva tayyorlashni o'ylab ko'rmaganmiding?
sentences.text_translation_ru: Ты не думал сам варить кофе дома?
sentences.text_translation_en: Haven't you thought about making coffee at home yourself?
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 想过。但是自己做比较麻烦，而且没有店里做的好喝。
sentences.pinyin: Xiǎng guo. Dànshì zìjǐ zuò bǐjiào máfan, érqiě méiyǒu diàn lǐ zuò de hǎo hē.
sentences.text_translation: O'ylab ko'rganman. Lekin o'zing tayyorlash ancha mashaqqatli, ustiga-ustak do'kondagidek mazali bo'lmaydi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Думал. Но самому готовить хлопотно, и получается не так вкусно, как в кофейне.
sentences.text_translation_en: I have. But making it yourself is a hassle, and it's not as tasty as in a shop.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 我也喜欢咖啡。最近发现一家新的咖啡店，环境特别好。
sentences.pinyin: Wǒ yě xǐhuān kāfēi. Zuìjìn fāxiàn yì jiā xīn de kāfēi diàn, huánjìng tèbié hǎo.
sentences.text_translation: Men ham qahvani yoqtiraman. Yaqinda yangi qahvaxona topdim, muhiti juda yaxshi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Я тоже люблю кофе. Недавно нашёл новую кофейню, обстановка там отличная.
sentences.text_translation_en: I like coffee too. I recently found a new café — the atmosphere is really nice.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 在图书馆旁边，里面很安静，还能看书。
sentences.pinyin: Zài túshūguǎn pángbiān, lǐmiàn hěn ānjìng, hái néng kàn shū.
sentences.text_translation: Kutubxona yonida, ichi juda sokin, kitob ham o'qisa bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Рядом с библиотекой, внутри очень тихо, можно даже почитать.
sentences.text_translation_en: Next to the library — it's very quiet inside, and you can read there too.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 那很不错！周末我们可以一起去坐坐。
sentences.pinyin: Nà hěn búcuò! Zhōumò wǒmen kěyǐ yìqǐ qù zuò zuo.
sentences.text_translation: Bu juda zo'r! Dam olish kunlari birga borib o'tirsak bo'ladi.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Это здорово! На выходных можем вместе туда зайти посидеть.
sentences.text_translation_en: That's great! On the weekend we can go sit there together.
sentences.speaker: B

sentences.text_original: 好啊！那家店的手冲咖啡特别有名。
sentences.pinyin: Hǎo a! Nà jiā diàn de shǒuchōng kāfēi tèbié yǒumíng.
sentences.text_translation: Yaxshi! O'sha do'konning qo'lda damlangan qahvasi juda mashhur.
sentences.text_translation_ru: Отлично! В той кофейне особенно знаменит кофе ручного заваривания.
sentences.text_translation_en: Sure! That shop's pour-over coffee is especially famous.
sentences.speaker: A

sentences.text_original: 手冲咖啡？我还没试过。期待！
sentences.pinyin: Shǒuchōng kāfēi? Wǒ hái méi shì guo. Qīdài!
sentences.text_translation: Qo'lda damlangan qahva? Hali sinab ko'rmaganman. Intizorman!
sentences.text_translation_ru: Кофе ручного заваривания? Я ещё не пробовал. Жду с нетерпением!
sentences.text_translation_en: Pour-over coffee? I haven't tried it yet. Looking forward to it!
sentences.speaker: B
